info.name: SiteLink Complete API
info.description: Complete SiteLink Backend API with Phone Authentication, OTP Verification, Image Upload, Search & Filter, and Admin Dashboard functionality

item.name: 1. Registration Flow

request.description: Register new customer with optional profile image. Returns OTP for verification. Note: Copy the OTP from response.
Register vendor account

formdata.description: Experience level: 0-1 Year, 1-3 Years, 3-5 Years, 5+ Years (optional)
Comma-separated skills: Mason, Carpenter, Plumber, Electrician, Painter, Welder, Tile Work, Rod Binding (optional)

request.description: Register worker account

item.description: Register new users with phone number authentication

request.description: Verify OTP received during registration. Use the OTP from registration response. Returns JWT token on success.
Test OTP attempt tracking. Try 3 times to see: 'Invalid OTP. 2 attempts remaining', then 'Maximum OTP attempts reached'
Resend OTP to phone number. Resets attempt counter and generates new OTP with fresh 10-minute expiration.
Login with verified phone number and password. Returns JWT token.
Test login with unverified account. Should return 403 error: 'Please verify your account with OTP before logging in'

item.name: 4. Forgot Password

request.description: Step 1: Request password reset for a registered phone number. Returns OTP (valid for 10 minutes). Note: Copy the OTP from response for next step.
Step 2: Verify the OTP received from forgot-password. Returns a resetPasswordToken (valid for 15 minutes). Note: Copy the resetPasswordToken from response for final step.
Step 3: Reset password using the resetPasswordToken from previous step. Password must be minimum 8 characters. After successful reset, user can login with new password.

item.description: Forgot password flow with OTP verification

item.name: 5. Test Scenarios

request.description: Test invalid phone format validation. Should return 400 error.
Test password confirmation validation. Should return 400: 'Passwords do not match'
Test duplicate phone registration. Should return 400: 'User already exists with this phone number'
Test password length validation. Should return 400: 'Password must be at least 8 characters'

item.description: Error handling and validation test cases

item.name: 6. Legal Documents

request.description: Get the current Privacy Policy. No authentication required. Anyone can view this document.
Get the current Terms and Conditions. No authentication required. Anyone can view this document.
Get all legal documents with full details. Admin only. Returns privacy policy and terms & conditions with version history.

formdata.value:
Privacy Policy

We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information...

Information We Collect

- Personal identification information (Name, email, phone number, etc.)

- Usage data and analytics

How We Use Your Information

- To provide and maintain our service

- To notify you about changes to our service

- To provide customer support
formdata.description: Full document content (can include HTML for formatting) (required)
Effective date in ISO format (optional, default: current date)

request.description: Create or update Privacy Policy. Admin only. Content can include HTML for formatting. If document exists, it will be updated; otherwise, a new one is created.

formdata.value:
Terms and Conditions

Welcome to SiteLink. By using our service, you agree to these terms...

Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using this service, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and conditions.

User Responsibilities

- You must provide accurate information during registration

- You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account

- You must not misuse our services

Service Availability

We strive to provide uninterrupted service but do not guarantee 100% uptime.
formdata.description: Full document content (can include HTML for formatting) (required)
Effective date in ISO format (optional, default: current date)

request.description: Create or update Terms and Conditions. Admin only. Content can include HTML for formatting. If document exists, it will be updated; otherwise, a new one is created.
Delete Privacy Policy document. Admin only. Use with caution as this permanently removes the document.
Delete Terms and Conditions document. Admin only. Use with caution as this permanently removes the document.

item.description: Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions API - Public access for viewing, Admin only for management

item.name: 7. Search & Filter APIs

query.description: General search across name, city, skills (optional)

request.description: Search and filter workers by city, skills, experience, and daily rate range. Returns paginated results with worker profiles.

query.description: Filter by verification status: true or false (optional)
General search across name, company, owner (optional)

request.description: Search and filter vendors by city, project types, and verification status. Returns paginated results with vendor profiles.

query.description: General search across title, company, description (optional)

request.description: Search and filter jobs by location, type, company, and required skills. Returns paginated job listings with poster details.

query.description: General search across name, email, subject, message (optional)

request.description: Search help and support tickets. Admin only. Search by email, phone, or general text across all fields.
Search across all entities (workers, vendors, jobs) simultaneously. Returns limited results from each category.
Get available filter options for workers including cities, skills, experience levels, and daily rate range. Use these values to populate filter dropdowns.
Get available filter options for vendors including cities and project types. Use these values to populate filter dropdowns.
Get available filter options for jobs including locations, companies, skills, and job types. Use these values to populate filter dropdowns.

item.description: Search and filter APIs for workers, vendors, jobs, and support tickets with pagination and sorting

item.name: 8. Admin Dashboard APIs

request.description: Get complete overview of all key metrics: total workers, vendors, customers, pending verifications, active subscriptions, requirements, and revenue. Real-time update.
Get total workers count with verified count and new workers this month. Real-time update.
Get total vendors count with verified count and new vendors this month. Real-time update.

query.description: Filter by status: pending or verified

request.description: Get list of users pending verification (workers with Aadhaar, vendors with GST/PAN). Real-time update.
Approve or reject user verification. Replace :userId with actual user MongoDB ObjectId. Set isVerified to true to approve, false to reject.

query.description: Filter by status: active, inactive, expired, cancelled

request.description: Get list of subscriptions with total revenue calculation. Hourly update frequency.

query.description: Time period: today, week, month, year, all

request.description: Get revenue for current month with breakdown by transaction type and daily revenue chart. Daily update frequency.
Get revenue for a specific month with detailed breakdown.
Get revenue for the past week (last 7 days).

query.description: Filter by status: active, in_progress, completed, cancelled
Filter by category: construction, renovation, maintenance, interior, other

request.description: Get active customer requirements with vendor responses. Includes stats by status and category. Real-time update.

query.description: Filter by type: worker, vendor, customer
Filter by verification status: true or false
Search across name, phone, email, company

request.description: Get all users with comprehensive filtering and search. Useful for user management.

item.description: Admin Dashboard APIs for monitoring and managing the platform. All endpoints require admin authentication and provide real-time or near real-time data.

variable.description: Store admin JWT token here after admin login
